title: Bolsius - True Scents - 18 Scented Tea Lights - Vanilla - Long Burn Time of 6 Hours - Diameter 39 mm – Natural Extracts – Includes Vegan Wax – Without Palm Oil
features: Enjoy a long-lasting fragrance experience with the Bolsius Vanilla scented tealights and discover somewhat sweet, creamy fragrant taste of vanilla with a dash of caramel, these tealights guarantee the cleanest fragrance release up to 6 hours, thanks to the CleanScent technology, this technology is a unique combination of the purest wax and a specially developed cotton wick that optimally evaporates the scent, made without palm oil and with natural extracts and plant-based wax, the collection includes various products with trendy fragrances and modern classics you can enjoy within the comfort of your own home
Fill the room with the somewhat sweet, creamy fragrant taste of vanilla with a dash of caramel, an inviting fragrance for a comfortable and sublimely relaxed homely feeling

The Cleanscent technology is a unique combination of the purest wax and a specially developed cotton wick that optimally evaporates the scent to ensure the cleanest fragrance release, made with love for people and planet , with 25% plant-based wax and no palm oil

Choose your favourite fragrance from Bolsius's collection, it combines iconic fragrances with natural extracts, made with love for people and planet, experience the pure fragrance experience of these trendy fragrances and modern classics within the comfort of your own home, crafted using Cleanscent technology they guarantee the purest fragrance experience and the cleanest fragrance release

Since 1870, Bolsius has been making quality products to create cosiness and a warm ambience in your home, we do this with passion, skilled craftsmanship and a love for people and planet, Bolsius inspires, connects and warms people with the magic of candlelight and fragrances that tickle the senses, it's how you can make every moment a special one, for yourself and for everyone around you
